overall.description: A first-person exploration sequence in a futuristic cyberpunk city, beginning on an outdoor terrace overlooking a dense skyline of neon-lit skyscrapers, transitioning through a glass-enclosed walkway, and ending in a dimly lit interior lounge with natural rock features. The footage is from a video game engine with high-fidelity graphics.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunny outdoor terrace with dry grass and palm trees overlooking a dense futuristic cityscape. The camera moves forward along a wooden deck, revealing neon-lit skyscrapers and modern glass buildings in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: glass-enclosed elevated walkway with city views

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions into a covered glass walkway with metal support beams, where the city skyline remains visible through large windows. Tropical plants line the interior as the camera continues moving forward along the wooden deck.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury interior lounge with natural rock wall and water feature

lounge chair becomes visible in the shaded corner of the interior space

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into a dramatically darker interior lounge featuring a massive natural rock wall and a water feature with purple accent lighting. The space transitions from the bright city views to an intimate, cave-like atmosphere with a wooden lounge chair visible in the corner.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, sun-drenched outdoor terrace into a moody, subterranean-style interior lounge. It begins by gliding along a wooden deck past dry grass and palm trees, revealing a sprawling futuristic cityscape of neon-lit skyscrapers under a clear sky. As the camera moves forward, the environment shifts into a glass-enclosed walkway where metal support beams and tropical plants frame the lingering views of the urban skyline. The scene then transitions from the brilliant daylight into a dramatically darker lounge, where the open city vistas are replaced by a massive natural rock wall and a water feature glowing with purple accent lighting. Finally, the camera settles into this intimate, cave-like atmosphere, passing a wooden lounge chair tucked into the dim corner.
